title: World's Greatest Dad
subTitle: After a dramatic twist of fate, high school English teacher Lance Clayton gets a second chance to fulfil his dream of becoming a famous writer.

title: Consecration
subTitle: A woman visits a Scottish convent in order to uncover the mystery behind her priest brother's sudden death. However, she stumbles upon several dark secrets during her investigation.

title: Jackdaw
subTitle: A former athlete and veteran cares for his younger brother amid financial woes. He takes a perilous job, leading to a dangerous adventure through a barren landscape.

title: DWM
subTitle: Two dance experts provide lessons in various hook steps and viewers send their recorded entries in a bid to feature on the screen.

title: DWM
subTitle: Two dance experts provide lessons in various hook steps and viewers send their recorded entries in a bid to feature on the screen.

title: Filler
subTitle: Bringing the best in television.

title: Chef vs Fridge
subTitle: Thinking outside the box is not going to cut it. These chefs must think inside the mystery refrigerator to prove their culinary skills and creativity.

title: Escape of Shark
subTitle: After a tsunami suddenly attacks, a beach party turns into a nightmare as the hotel is submerged in the sea. All the partygoers must find a way to survive when a giant shark starts hunting them.

title: Maneater
subTitle: Jessie goes on a vacation with her friends after her wedding is cancelled. Soon, their holiday turns into a nightmare when they are relentlessly attacked by a shark.

title: Foxter & Max
subTitle: An artistic pre-teen finds a can of spray paint and uses it to create a dog out of graffiti. Subsequently, his work of art comes to life in the form of an intelligent animal made of nanobots.

title: Matchless Mulan
subTitle: To protect her father from harm, a courageous girl disguises herself as a male warrior and joins the imperial army to defend her nation.

title: Dà zhangyú
subTitle: A fisherman and his friend catch a strange octopus from the sea. However, they accidentally get involved in a conspiracy about genetic mutations.

title: Master So Dragon Subduing Palms 2
subTitle: During the Qing dynasty, two guards, Su Beg Er and Tie Qiao San, investigate the mysterious murders of two governors in Linjiang County. They join a local gang to uncover a dangerous python cult.

title: Maggie Moore(s)
subTitle: Police Chief Sanders probes strange killings of two women who share the same name. He is drawn to Rita, an inquisitive neighbour keen on aiding the investigation.

title: Hansan
subTitle: Korean admiral Yi Sun-sin and his fleet battle against the attack of the Japanese navy and achieve an epic win through a secret weapon.

title: Muzzle
subTitle: Muzzle is a gripping Cop & K9 thriller of vengeance and betrayal, an LAPD K9 and his K-9 partner battle on the streets of LA when they get into a shootout with local drug dealers and his K9 is shot dead. Driven by grief, our hero go rogue.

title: The Marsh King's Daughter
subTitle: Helena is haunted by memories of her estranged father Jacob, who held her and her mother captive for years. However, when he escapes prison, she becomes paranoid as she prepares for his arrival.

title: Extremely Wicked, Shockingly Evil and Vile
subTitle: Ted starts dating Liz and bonds with her young daughter Molly. However, their relationship takes a terrifying turn when Ted becomes a prime suspect in multiple murders.

title: Extremely Wicked, Shockingly Evil and Vile
subTitle: Ted starts dating Liz and bonds with her young daughter Molly. However, their relationship takes a terrifying turn when Ted becomes a prime suspect in multiple murders.

title: Poseidon Rex
subTitle: During the quest for a lost treasure, things take a dangerous turn as a group of deep-sea divers accidentally awaken an aquatic dinosaur.

title: Train to Busan Presents: Peninsula
subTitle: A former soldier along with his teammates sets out on a mission to battle hordes of post-apocalyptic zombies in the Korean peninsula wastelands.

title: Dance With Me
subTitle: Dance fans show their skills and viewers learn cool moves from famous dancers, mixing talent display with fun lessons for all.

title: Chef vs Fridge
subTitle: Thinking outside the box is not going to cut it. These chefs must think inside the mystery refrigerator to prove their culinary skills and creativity.

title: Huge Shark
subTitle: As the ocean currents change, a deadly cold-blooded killer enters the environment. Disruption ensues when an expert is invited to investigate the situation.

title: Horror Shark
subTitle: An accident causes a great white shark to turn into a killing mutant. However, the problem worsens when the beast receives the ability to overpower humans.

title: Escape of Shark
subTitle: After a tsunami suddenly attacks, a beach party turns into a nightmare as the hotel is submerged in the sea. All the partygoers must find a way to survive when a giant shark starts hunting them.

title: The Legend of Loulan
subTitle: When young archaeologist Wu Tian finds a mirror from the Loulan civilisation, he goes on a mission to protect the treasure of the civilisation and uncover the secrets of the mysterious Ghost Army.

title: Battle Drone
subTitle: A group of mercenaries embark on a mission to Chernobyl for the CIA. However, the seemingly simple assignment takes a deadly turn when they are ambushed by droids.

title: Vincent N Roxxy
subTitle: An unlikely romance develops between Vincent, a loner, and Roxxy, a rebel, while they are on the run to save their lives. However, their violent past seems to catch up with them wherever they go.

title: The Mauritanian
subTitle: A wrongfully detained man, Mohamedou Ould, fights for freedom as his lawyer uncovers shocking truths, exposing injustice inside a secretive prison system.

title: The Space Between Us
subTitle: An astronaut dies after giving birth to a boy on Mars, but his existence is kept a secret. Years later, he befriends a girl on the internet who helps him look for his father.

title: Sicario: Day of the Soldado
subTitle: CIA agent, Matt Greer, and his team embark on a mission to contain drug cartels, responsible for smuggling of terrorists across the border.

title: Hustlers
subTitle: Destiny meets Ramona, an old friend and veteran exotic dancer, who shows her how to swindle money from rich clients. However, they soon land in trouble as their scheme does not last very long.

title: Reprisal
subTitle: Jacob, a bank manager, teams up with a former policeman to capture a notorious robber who killed his co-worker during a heist. However, tension rises when the criminal kidnaps Jacob's wife and daughter.

title: Hotel Mumbai
subTitle: A hotel staff risks everything to keep its patrons safe during a terror attack, especially a British heiress, her husband and her infant.

title: White Haired Princess
subTitle: An ambitious eunuch takes undue advantage of the Emperor's illness to seize control over the Ming dynasty. However, an unforeseen rebellion erupts after the king recovers from his illness.

title: Dance With Me

title: Chef vs Fridge
subTitle: Thinking outside the box is not going to cut it. These chefs must think inside the mystery refrigerator to prove their culinary skills and creativity.

title: Mega Crocodile
subTitle: A researcher is commissioned to search for a missing person on the Hell Island full of crocodiles but soon find themselves endangered when giant crocodiles begin threatening their lives.

title: Jurassic Attack
subTitle: Following their latest covert operation, an elite squad's return flight ends in disaster, leaving them stranded in a remote forest amongst prehistoric predators.

subTitle: Police Chief Sanders probes strange killings of two women who share the same name. He is drawn to Rita, an inquisitive neighbour keen on aiding the investigation.

title: Escape of Shark
subTitle: After a tsunami suddenly attacks, a beach party turns into a nightmare as the hotel is submerged in the sea. All the partygoers must find a way to survive when a giant shark starts hunting them.

title: Python Island
subTitle: A group of explorers set out to search for a magical tree in the jungle and soon find a mysterious creature is waiting to attack them.

title: The Mauritanian
subTitle: A wrongfully detained man, Mohamedou Ould, fights for freedom as his lawyer uncovers shocking truths, exposing injustice inside a secretive prison system.

title: Nowhere to Hide
subTitle: A woman (Meredith Monroe) must save her daughter (Brittany Finamore) from the same man (Brian Dietzen) who killed her husband.

title: Orphan: First Kill
subTitle: After escaping from a psychiatric facility, Esther travels to the USA by impersonating a girl from a rich family. However, the mother of the family vows to protect her own from the impersonator.

title: The Balkan Line
subTitle: NATO bombs Belgrade in March 1999 and Serbian forces withdraw from Kosovo by June, leaving Serbs vulnerable. Meanwhile, five Russians try to secure Kosovo's airport until peacekeepers arrive.

title: Gunpowder Milkshake
subTitle: Three generations of hitwomen fight for survival against a criminal firm and try to protect what is most important to them.

title: You Were Never Really Here
subTitle: An army veteran scours a brothel on a tense mission to rescue the kidnapped daughter of a New York State senator. However, things soon take a dark turn when he discovers a corrupt conspiracy.
